sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62431" key="*leontw/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Λεοντών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a month at Alexandria, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.7</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
